message:
fix(cli): restore all eight tools as the default --tools set

Revert the default --tools value from the narrowed four-tool set
(read,write,edit,bash) back to the full eight-tool set
(read,bash,edit,write,grep,find,ls,hashline_edit). The narrowing in the
previous commit was premature — downstream integrations and extension
tests expect all tools to be available by default, and the opt-in
surface reduction is better handled by per-session configuration than
a default change.

Update the enabled_tools() unit test to assert the full eight-tool
default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
